title: Holy Rollers: The True Story of Card Counting Christians
original_title: Holy Rollers: The True Story of Card Counting Christians
overview: Follow the rise of the largest and most well-funded blackjack team in America -- made up entirely of card-counting, churchgoing Christians. The players don't see blackjack as a sin; they take from casinos and give to their families and churches.
